name: Pixal3D
description: Local Pixal3D image-to-3D backend and Gradio UI packaged as an installable Nymph module. Install provisions the shared TRELLIS.2/Pixal3D runtime venv; TRELLIS model weights are not required.

overview.body:
Pixal3D generates textured GLB assets from a single image.

Official Ui launches the upstream Pixal3D custom web UI in the Manager WebView. Nymphs Ui launches the NymphsCore Pixal3D app on the same local Gradio server/API. Fetch Models downloads the Pixal3D checkpoints and required helper models into NymphsData. The module uses the shared TRELLIS.2/Pixal3D runtime venv at $HOME/TRELLIS.2/.venv, so TRELLIS.2 and Pixal3D do not build separate native stacks.

License and access:
- Pixal3D is MIT licensed for Tencent-published code, parameters, weights, and documentation.
- Third-party components keep their own licenses.
- BRIA RMBG-2.0 is gated on Hugging Face and may have separate access terms. Use the same Hugging Face account for the access form and module token.
requirements: Shared TRELLIS.2/Pixal3D runtime venv; installed automatically if missing

options.label: Auto-detect
options.description: Read the NVIDIA compute capability and select the flash-attn target arch

options.label: SM80 / RTX 30+40
options.description: 8.x GPUs: RTX 30/40, A100/A30/A10/A40, L4/L40, RTX A/Ada

options.label: SM90 / H100/H200
options.description: Hopper GPUs: GH200, H200, H100, H800

options.label: SM100 / B200
options.description: Datacenter Blackwell: GB200, B200, GB300, B300

options.label: SM110 / Jetson Thor
options.description: Jetson Thor targets: T5000 and T4000

options.label: SM120 / RTX 50
options.description: RTX 50-series and RTX PRO Blackwell workstation/server GPUs

options.label: MAX_JOBS=2
options.description: Lowest RAM pressure for the flash-attn source build

options.label: MAX_JOBS=4
options.description: Recommended flash-attn build cap for 32GB RAM

options.label: MAX_JOBS=8
options.description: More CPU and RAM use during the flash-attn source build

options.label: NVCC_THREADS=1
options.description: Safest compiler thread setting for lower RAM pressure

options.label: NVCC_THREADS=2
options.description: Moderate compiler threading if the machine has RAM headroom

options.label: NVCC_THREADS=4
options.description: Aggressive compiler threading; can multiply memory pressure with Max jobs

manager_action_groups.title: Model Fetch
manager_action_groups.description: Download Pixal3D checkpoints and helper models into the shared NymphsData cache. Start with Low VRAM 1024 on 16 GB GPUs. GGUF profiles download experimental community quantized weights for future runtime testing; safetensors remain the active default until GGUF generation is fully verified. BRIA RMBG-2.0 access must be accepted on Hugging Face before its gated weights can download.

options.label: Low VRAM 1024
options.description: Recommended first test; lower peak VRAM and 1024 cascade

options.label: Standard 1536
options.description: Heavier profile for high VRAM systems

options.label: GGUF Q4_K_M (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q4 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

options.label: GGUF Q5_K_M (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q5 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

options.label: GGUF Q6_K (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q6 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

options.label: GGUF Q8_0 (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q8 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

notes: The official upstream training code and data toolkit are preserved in the module repo, but v0.1 exposes inference and Gradio testing only.
Install/Repair pins utils3d and creates the utils3d.pt/np compatibility aliases required by MoGe camera estimation.
Official Ui starts the local Gradio server/API and opens the upstream Pixal3D custom UI.
Close Gradio stops only the embedded Gradio UI; the full stop entrypoint remains available internally for module lifecycle cleanup.
Pixal3D hides separate Start API and Stop buttons from the module action strip because normal Gradio use does not require them.
Nymphs Ui starts the same local Gradio server/API and opens the NymphsCore custom UI.
The Gradio launcher no longer prints the API URL during API pre-start, and status reports the Gradio URL while the Gradio UI is running.
The API running check now also accepts a healthy /server_info probe so the Gradio launcher does not spawn a duplicate API on an occupied port.
Low-VRAM Gradio exposes Texture NAF Size and defaults the texture conditioning NAF pass to 512 to reduce 16 GB GPU pressure.
Gradio is allowed to serve generated GLB files from the shared Pixal3D outputs directory.
v0.1.27 republishes the dual Official Ui/Nymphs Ui manifest so installed 0.1.26 runtimes surface a normal Manager update.
v0.1.28 makes Nymphs Ui the primary Manager UI while keeping Official Ui as a separate action.
Do not vendor model weights into this repo.
